description: Plugin-distributed hooks for microsoft-365-copilot. Auto-merged with the consumer's session hooks when the plugin is installed.

hooks.comment: Advisory: M365 Copilot house-opinion violations (unpinned declarative-agent manifest schema, instructions over the ~8000-char budget, connector schema property without semantic labels, org-data grounding doc missing a 'Licensing impact' line, RSS/RCD described as a security boundary). Advisory by default; set M365_COPILOT_STRICT=1 to make it blocking.
